title: Pocket Jukebox
body:
# ▶️What Is It?
**You can listen any MC default music right through your inventory!**

# 🎵Features
- Classic and new music discs
- C418 most famous tracks
- Ambient soundtracks from a lot of bioms
- Сonvenient menu with track selection

## ℹ️How To Install:
1. Install Fabric 1.21 (1.21.1) (+Latest version)
2. Install Fabric Api 1.21 (1.21.1)
3. Download Pocket Jukebox
4. Put Fabric Api and Pocket Jukebox to your mods folder

## ⚙️Not Working?
**Try this:**
- check the versions of the mod and fabric api
- check the version of the game (needed Fabric 1.21 or 1.21.1)
- try to launch only Fabric Api and Pocket Jukebox
- install java 21
- try another game launcher
